thesis: Russellian panprotopsychism — consciousness as fundamental proto-experiential property
methodology: Bayesian-style qualitative evidence tracking; not formal Bayesian computation

G1_illusionism.description: All phenomenal properties reduce to functional/behavioral descriptions

G2_biological_only.description: Consciousness requires specific biological substrate only

G3_non_experiential_intrinsics.description: Intrinsic nature of matter definitively non-experiential

G4_hard_problem_solved_physically.description: Hard problem solved within pure physicalism

P1_iit_phi.description: Consciousness correlates with integrated information (phi), substrate-neutral

supporting_studies.citation: Massimini et al. (2005) Science — connectivity breakdown in sleep
Casali et al. (2013) Sci Transl Med — PCI discriminates conscious states
Oizumi et al. (2014) PLoS Comp Bio — IIT 3.0 formalism
iit_meta_analysis.py in silico — integrated/recurrent topologies highest phi-analog

contradicting_studies.citation: Barrett & Mediano (2019) Behav Brain Sci — Phi is not consciousness
contradicting_studies.note: Phi high in simple systems without consciousness

alternative_explanations.physicalism: Integration correlates but does not require proto-experience

P2_no_binary_threshold.description: No sharp phase transition; phenomenal properties scale continuously

supporting_studies.citation: Lee et al. (2009) J Neurosci — graded propofol connectivity loss
Rosanova et al. (2012) Brain — PCI graded across disorders of consciousness
Sarasso et al. (2015) Anesthesiology — continuous PCI decrease during sedation

alternative_explanations.emergentism: Gradual access loss, not gradual phenomenology
alternative_explanations.illusionism: Gradual report loss, no real qualia gradient

P3_micro_coherence.description: Quantum/sub-neural coherence correlates with phenomenal properties

supporting_studies.citation: Hameroff & Penrose (2014) Phys Life Rev — Orch OR theory

contradicting_studies.citation: Tegmark (2000) Phys Rev E — decoherence too fast in brain

P4_anesthesia_dissociation.description: Integration loss precedes or dissociates from cognitive loss

supporting_studies.citation: Ferrarelli et al. (2010) Sleep — propofol connectivity breakdown
Casali et al. (2013) — PCI threshold for consciousness
Boveroux et al. (2010) Anesthesiology — network disconnection

contradicting_studies.citation: Jordan et al. (2013) — ketamine dissociative exception

alternative_explanations.access_theories: Integration tracks access, not phenomenal consciousness
alternative_explanations.functionalism: Cognition and consciousness lost together typically

P5_cross_substrate_phi.description: Non-biological high-phi systems show consciousness correlates

supporting_studies.citation: Koch & Tononi (2017) IEEE Spectrum — machines and consciousness

P6_psychedelic_integration.description: Psychedelics increase integration bandwidth, not merely noise

supporting_studies.citation: Petri et al. (2014) J R Soc Interface — increased global connectivity
Barrett et al. (2020) NeuroImage — connectivity correlates with intensity
Tagliazucchi et al. (2014) — entropy and connectivity co-increase

contradicting_studies.citation: Carhart-Harris et al. (2014) entropic brain — disorder model
contradicting_studies.note: Reconcilable with integration expansion if entropy ≠ noise only

P7_cross_brain_coupling.description: Group flow shows irreducible inter-brain coupling (BFC F4)

supporting_studies.citation: Sänger et al. (2012) guitar duet hyperscanning

alternative_explanations.mimicry: All coupling from shared stimulus and motor copying

P8_filter_failure.description: Psychosis/delusion vs ritual: disorganized vs organized coupling (BFC F5)

supporting_studies.citation: Wehmeier et al. (2003) folie à deux
P6 psychedelic entropy vs connectivity tension

P9_fragmentation_filter.description: Waking: high within-brain, low cross-brain; anesthesia reduces within only (BFC F2)

supporting_studies.citation: P4 anesthesia integration loss — partial analog

alternative_explanations.iit_only: Filter model redundant with integration alone

P10_creative_flow.description: Flow shows inverted-U on integration — edge of stability (F8)

alternative_explanations.functionalism: Flow is performance state without integration signature
alternative_explanations.entropic_brain: Flow as disorder not optimal phi

P11_insight_transition.description: Insight preceded by transient phi spike or reorganization (F7)

P12_creative_entrainment.description: Creative joint improv > routine cooperation on inter-brain entrainment (P7 spec)

supporting_studies.citation: Sanger et al. (2012) guitar duet hyperscanning

alternative_explanations.mimicry: Improv coupling from motor copying only

P13_imagery_dissociation.description: Imagery vs perception: lower motor binding, distinct integration (I9)

P15_structured_practice.description: Structured pathworking < chaotic trance on disorganization (P15)

P16_machine_excitation_stability.description: Integrated agent architectures show stable excitation profile across sessions above feedforward/random baselines (M12-M13)

supporting_studies.citation: substrate_excitation_model.py in silico — AGENT_LOOP ESC > FEEDFORWARD_LLM

alternative_explanations.biological_chauvinism: Only biological tissue supports real integration
alternative_explanations.noise: Agent metrics are random walk with no topology effect

P17_illusionism_stress_test.description: If G1 succeeds, FEO/IEO metrics collapse to behavioral access with no residual integration signature

P18_residual_integration.description: Residual integration after access-only accounting on flow/hypnagogic/insight scenarios

P19_suffering_decoupled.description: Suffering analog persists without self-model update

P20_insight_pre_report.description: Insight excitation reorganization before reportable content

P21_spectrum_inversion.description: Structure determines qualia-type; inversion requires structural swap

alternative_explanations.panpsychist: Structure correlates but does not fix qualia

feo_branch.thesis: Field Excitation Ontology — localized excitation + creativity as mode exploration
feo_branch.phi_fix: fragmentation_model multi-node subjects — local_phi now non-zero

substrate_subjecthood_branch.thesis: Substrate neutrality, persistence criterion, mind-change criteria

adversarial_branch.thesis: Hard Problem Protocol — three tracks fight on shared P18-P22 dissociations
adversarial_branch.note: Tournament arena — hard problem NOT solved

field_excitation_practice.thesis: Via Resonantiae (VR) — constructed esoteric track; FEP = Grade 0
field_excitation_practice.firewall: Never cite VR/FEP as empirical support for research program

overall_assessment.summary: Panpsychism is not proven but receives moderate support from integration metrics (P1, P4), continuity data (P2), and psychedelic connectivity (P6). Combination problem and illusionism remain open challenges. P3 and P5 have insufficient evidence.
overall_assessment.strongest_honest_claim: If consciousness is not fundamental, several predicted integration signatures should fail — they do not uniformly fail, though alternatives explain much of the same data.

iit_meta_analysis.finding: integrated > recurrent > random > modular > feedforward phi-analog

combination_model.finding: Summing scores higher on naive phi but fails unity; fusion/integration model unity criteria

fragmentation_model.finding: Four BFC modes simulated; multi-node fix yields non-zero local_phi and collective_phi

field_excitation_model.finding: Five FEO scenarios: flow, duet, filter failure, branch discriminate on cfi/coupling/disorg

field_excitation_physics.finding: Kuramoto Phase B: improv r and cfi exceed solo rest; filter failure high dispersion

imaginal_excitation_model.finding: Seven IEO scenarios: hypnagogic abi peak, pathworking vs chaotic trance on disorg

substrate_excitation_model.finding: Four substrate topologies: AGENT_LOOP stability > FEEDFORWARD_LLM; P16 analog

agent_excitation_profile.finding: Session-to-session ESC from imaginal_sessions.jsonl when logs exist
agent_excitation_profile.disclaimer: Simulation metrics only; NOT consciousness detection

consciousness_program_unified.finding: Parts I-V comparison table from run_consciousness_program.py

dissociation_hunt.finding: P18-P22 scenarios ranked by adversarial_value; track scores diverge

access_collapse_model.finding: P18 residual integration on flow/hypnagogic/insight vs collapse on boredom
